title: The EU Mission on Adaptation to Climate Change publishes its 2025/26 Activity Report
content: The EU Mission on Adaptation to Climate Change has published its 2026 Activity Report, highlighting continued progress in turning climate adaptation ambitions into concrete action across Europe.
snippet: The EU Mission on Adaptation to Climate Change has published its 2026 Activity Report, highlighting continued progress in turning climate adaptation ambitions into concrete action across Europe.

title: Selection process for European TEN-T Coordinator
content: The European Commission’s Directorate-General for Mobility and Transport has launched the procedure for the selection of a new European TEN-T Coordinator for the North Sea–Baltic European Transport Corridor, with the appointment expected by autumn 2026.

title: VAT in the Digital Age: 2026 Work Programme available
content: The European Commission has published the work programme for VAT in the Digital Age (ViDA), covering implementation activities planned for 2026.
snippet: The European Commission has published the work programme for VAT in the Digital Age (ViDA), covering implementation activities planned for 2026.

title: New rules bring increased transparency to the short-term rentals sector
content: New EU rules provided by Regulation (EU) 2024/1028, aimed at increasing transparency in the short-term rentals sector are now applying across Europe. Short-term accommodation rentals have grown rapidly across the EU, largely driven by online platforms, and now represent around one quarter of tourist

title: Commission presents plan to secure Europe's fertiliser supply and food security

title: EU continues to monitor oil market situation and prepares coordinated response to address the jet fuel supply situation
content: While there are no shortages of fuel in the EU at present, regional supply constraints could arise in the next weeks if the blockage of oil supplies via the Strait of Hormuz does not get resolved – with jet fuel being the primary concern.

title: EU helps forge a future for Indian Ocean swordfish
content: The European Union helped secure an important agreement in Malé, Maldives, at the annual meeting of the Indian Ocean Tuna Commission (IOTC), introducing a new measure to better manage Indian Ocean swordfish. The agreement is based on a joint proposal from the EU and Australia.

title: Europe’s youth engage with Commissioners Hoekstra and Micallef on climate resilience
content: Climate change is no longer a distant threat for Europe's youth. It is reshaping their coastlines, their farms, their cities, and their futures.
snippet: Climate change is no longer a distant threat for Europe's youth. It is reshaping their coastlines, their farms, their cities, and their futures.

title: Commission report shows Schengen area continues to be resilient and ready for future challenges
content: The Commission published its fifth State of the Schengen report on 18 May, reviewing developments in the Schengen area over the past year and setting priorities for the year ahead. The Schengen area continues to demonstrate resilience, underpinned by collective efforts at both EU and national level.

title: Commissioners Šuica and Brunner discuss migration and border management with EU Mediterranean countries
content: Commissioners Dubravka Šuica and Magnus Brunner attended the MED9 Interior Ministers' Conference, on 18 May. Discussions focused on combating illegal migration and protecting the EU's external border in the Mediterranean region, as well as the implementation of the Pact on Migration and Asylum.
snippet: Commissioners Dubravka Šuica and Magnus Brunner attended the MED9 Interior Ministers' Conference, on 18 May. Discussions focused on combating illegal migration and protecting the EU's external border

title: EMN Cyprus High-Level Presidency Conference on the implementation of the Pact on Migration and Asylum
content: The European Migration Network (EMN) Cyprus High-Level Presidency Conference, ‘Taking stock of the Pact on Migration and Asylum: turning strategy into reality’ will take place at the Filoxenia Conference Centre in Nicosia on 19 and 20 May 2026.

title: Commission announces measures to better protect migrant workers and fight illegal employment

title: Roundtables - cloud computing services

title: EU Space for Disaster Resilience: SUNSHINE Project Convened Its Third Training Seminar in Romania

snippet: From 5 to 8 May 2026, the EU-funded SUNSHINE project is holding its third Training Seminar in Timișoara, Romania.

title: Commission welcomes political agreement on implementation of EU-US trade deal
content: The European Commission welcomes the political agreement reached today between the European Parliament and the Council of the EU on two Regulations eliminating tariffs on all US industrial goods and providing preferential market access for certain US agricultural and seafood products.

title: Commissioner Kos in Montenegro to mark 20th anniversary of restoring independence
content: Today, Commissioner for Enlargement Marta Kos is in Montenegro to mark the 20th anniversary of the restoration of the country’s independence and to reaffirm the EU’s strong support for Montenegro’s EU accession process.

title: Commission approves €1.3 billion German State aid to support renewable hydrogen production
content: The European Commission has approved, under EU State aid rules, a €1.3 billion German State aid scheme to support the production of renewable hydrogen through the European Hydrogen Bank's “Auctions-as-a-Service” tool for the auction that closed in 2026.

title: Commission approves €288 million German State aid for first-of-a-kind facilities in semiconductor value chain
content: The European Commission has approved €288 million in German State aid to support the setting up two new facilities in the semiconductor supply chain.
snippet: The European Commission has approved €288 million in German State aid to support the setting up two new facilities in the semiconductor supply chain.

title: Strengthening EU farming resilience: study confirms key adaptation pathways

title: Multi-hazard floods in Europe tripled over 30 years
content: Average economic losses from so-called compound floods are nearly three times higher than those from single-source floods.
snippet: Average economic losses from so-called compound floods are nearly three times higher than those from single-source floods.

title: Commission releases €158.9 million to Albania, Montenegro and North Macedonia under EU Growth Plan for the Western Balkans

title: International Day Against Homophobia, Biphobia and Transphobia: Statement by the High Representative on behalf of the European Union 2026
content: Where inequalities and discrimination persist, democracy cannot thrive. Equality is not optional, it is the bedrock of free and resilient societies.

title: First-ever geographical indication craft name receives EU-wide protection

title: Commission seeks feedback on industrial biotechnology and biomanufacturing
content: The European Commission launched a call to gather views on the potential for industrial biotechnology and biomanufacturing in the EU.
